Always treat every firearm as if it is loaded...

questions.question_text: What is the first rule of firearm safety?
options: Always treat every firearm as if it is loaded
Keep your finger off the trigger until ready to shoot
Never point a firearm at anything you don't intend to destroy
Be sure of your target and what is beyond it
questions.correct_answer: Always treat every firearm as if it is loaded

questions.question_text: When should you unload a firearm?
Explain why it's important to know what is beyond your target when shooting.
